record_existence_and_kind.command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "with c(id) as (...) select c.id, r.record_kind, r.display_name, e.entity_name, e.entity_type, r.primary_source_id from c left join records r on r.record_id=c.id left join entities e on e.record_id=c.id;"
record_existence_and_kind.result: All 13 checked records (10 aliases plus 3 targets) exist with record_kind=entity.

commands: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "with c(id) as (...) select c.id as alias_id, ia.target as existing_identity_alias from c left join identity_aliases ia on ia.kind='entity' and ia.alias=c.id where ia.alias is not null;"
existing_alias_conflicts.result: No rows or jq output for the 10 proposed alias_ids.

commands: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "with pairs(alias,target) as (...) select p.alias,p.target,d.reason from pairs p join do_not_merge d on d.kind='entity' and ((d.record_id_a=p.alias and d.record_id_b=p.target) or (d.record_id_a=p.target and d.record_id_b=p.alias));"
do_not_merge_conflicts.result: No SQLite rows and no do-not-merge JSON hits for the proposed alias-target pairs.

prior_prep_conflicts.command: for id in <10 proposed alias_ids>; do rg -l "\"alias_id\": \"$id\"|\"alias_id\":\"$id\"" data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch0*-prep.json; done
prior_prep_conflicts.result: No prior prep artifact through codex-identity-batch096 contains any proposed alias_id.

commands: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select lower(coalesce(e.entity_name, e.name, r.display_name)) as n, count(*) c, group_concat(r.record_id, ' | ') ids from records r join entities e on e.record_id=r.record_id where r.record_kind='entity' group by n having c>1 order by c desc, n limit 80;"

sqlite3 -json data/canonical.db "with ids(id) as (...) select r.record_id, r.display_name, e.entity_name, e.entity_type, r.raw_text, er.source_id, er.block_id, er.page_number, json_extract(er.ref_json,'$.source_quote') quote from ids join records r on r.record_id=ids.id join entities e on e.record_id=r.record_id left join evidence_refs er on er.record_id=r.record_id order by r.record_id, er.ordinal;"
source_validator_evidence.result: Candidate clusters were selected from exact duplicate entity_name groups and checked against source/evidence refs for TransCore LP, Siemens Mobility, Inc., and MTA IT.

forbidden_command_compliance.result: This prep used only local deterministic inspection and one apply_patch write. No provider/profile commands and none of canonicalize, canonicalize-wave, canonicalize-review, campaign dedup, identity-review-run, write, ask, schema-propose, ontology-normalize-run, materialize, export-jsonl, or validate were run.
